mapper.select: SELECT pdf_id, file_name, drive_file_id, file_path, reg_user_id, create_dt FROM tb_pdf WHERE pdf_id = #{pdfId}
SELECT pdf_id, file_name, drive_file_id, file_path, reg_user_id, create_dt FROM tb_pdf WHERE drive_file_id = #{driveFileId}
SELECT pdf_id, file_name, drive_file_id, file_path, reg_user_id, create_dt FROM tb_pdf WHERE drive_file_id = #{driveFileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pdf ( file_name, drive_file_id, file_path, reg_user_id ) VALUES ( #{fileName}, #{driveFileId}, #{filePath}, #{regUserId} )
